description.from: Deals 871*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+500.2% ATK Magic DMG to an enemy and recovers HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. Increases own ATK by 4% for 15sec. This ATK increase effect stacks up to 6 times.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG that ignores enemy DEF, and heals 25% of DMG as HP.

description.from: Moves to the rearmost enemy and deals 484*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+278% ATK Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies. Increases Magic DMG taken by 20% and reduces Status Resistance by 320 for 5sec.
description.to: Moves behind the furthest enemy and deals ??? M.DMG. Hit enemies take 30% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.

description.from: Deals 458*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+263.6% ATK Magic DMG to enemies within range 4 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects and all damage taken is reduced by 60%.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to all enemies in range. Gains CC immunity while using this skill.

description.from:
Upon killing an enemy, reduces the Cooldown of all skills by 30% and gains [Harvest] stacks 1.

[Harvest]: Increases ATK by 80*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), stacking up to 10 times.
description.to: When an enemy is killed by this hero, ATK is increased by ??? for 12 sec, and all skill cooldown is reduced by 30%.

IV.from: When [Harvest] is triggered, restores 1000 of your Mana.
IV.to: Per each kill, recovers 1 orb of mana.

dark.from: Mana cost increases by 2000, but after using a skill, if there are nearby enemies, additionally uses [Absorbing Blow].
dark.to: Mana consumption is increased by 1, and upon using the skill, [Absorbing Blow] is activated. Cannot use when there are no enemies in range.

light.from: Damage is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled.

dark.from: Mana cost increases by 1000, but triggers [Harvest] once.
dark.to: DMG taken is reduced by 50% while skill is in use.

light.from: Mana recovery per second increases by 10% per stack.
light.to: Each stack increases Mana recovery per sec by 50%.

dark.from: If stacks are 6 or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.
dark.to: While stack number is higher than 5, Mana is always at 100% and cooldowns are decreased by an additional 1 sec per each sec.

description.from: [Absorbing Blow] increases DMG by {0}% and resets its Cooldown upon killing an enemy.
description.to: [Absorbing Blow] Increases DMG by {0}% and upon killing an enemy, ATK is increased by 20% for 10 sec. ATK increase effect can be stacked up to max 3 times.

description.from: [Devil's Prom] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.
description.to: [Devil's Prom] Mana cost is reduced by 1, and Crit DMG is increased by {0}%.

dark.from: When attacking with a skill, increases Epis’s Attack by 4% and Armor Penetration by 4%. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
dark.to: All of Epis's attacks decrease the M.DEF of hit enemies by 20% for 10 sec. ATK rises by 2% per each enemy hit. Maximum stack number is 10.

description.from: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to 5 times.
description.to: Upon attacking, there is a 25% chance of dealing {0}% of ATK as extra M.DMG, and ATK being increased by {1}% ATK boost can be stacked up to 10 times max.
